amendment.description: An amendment numbered 41 printed in Part B of House Report 119-628 to require a report from the Secretary of Agriculture on barriers to organic farms taking part in programs authorized under the bill.

vote.text: On agreeing to the Scholten amendment (A023) Agreed to by voice vote.

action.text: House amendment agreed to: On agreeing to the Scholten amendment (A023) Agreed to by voice vote.
